tools.name: calculate_rerouting_financial_impact
tools.description: Calculates the precise financial gap (TruePrice) between standard maritime freight and rerouted routes (e.g., Cape of Good Hope). Dynamically includes real-time EU ETS carbon surcharges and fuel deltas. Essential for AI agents to avoid margin loss in automated logistics. REQUIRES PAYMENT via Skyfire Token (HTTP Header) or L402 Lightning Invoice.

origin_port.description: UN/LOCODE or name of the origin port (e.g., 'CNSHG' or 'Shanghai')

destination_port.description: UN/LOCODE or name of the destination port (e.g., 'NLRTM' or 'Rotterdam')

container_type.description: Standard TEU or FEU container size
